segments.text: Of Moab. Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says:
Woe to Nebo! For it is laid waste. Kiriathaim is disappointed. It is taken. Misgab is put to shame and broken down.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
The praise of Moab is no more. In Heshbon they have devised evil against her:
‘Come! Let’s cut her off from being a nation.’You also, Madmen, will be brought to silence. The sword will pursue you.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: The sound of a cry from Horonaim, desolation and great destruction!
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Moab is destroyed. Her little ones have caused a cry to be heard.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For they will go up by the ascent of Luhith with continual weeping. For at the descent of Horonaim they have heard the distress of the cry of destruction.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Flee! Save your lives! Be like the juniper bush in the wilderness.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For, because you have trusted in your works and in your treasures, you also will be taken. Chemosh will go out into captivity, his priests and his princes together.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: The destroyer will come on every city, and no city will escape; the valley also will perish, and the plain will be destroyed, as Yahweh has spoken.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Give wings to Moab, that she may fly and get herself away: and her cities will become a desolation, without anyone to dwell in them.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Cursed is he who does the work of Yahweh negligently; and cursed is he who keeps back his sword from blood.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Moab has been at ease from his youth, and he has settled on his dregs, and has not been emptied from vessel to vessel, neither has he gone into captivity; therefore his taste remains in him, and his scent is not changed.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore behold, the days come,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,

that I will send to him those who pour off, and they will pour him off; and they will empty his vessels, 
and break their containers in pieces.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Moab will be ashamed of Chemosh, as the house of Israel was ashamed of Bethel, their confidence.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “How do you say, ‘We are mighty men, and valiant men for the war’?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Moab is laid waste, and they have gone up into his cities, 
and his chosen young men have gone down to the slaughter,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: says the King, whose name is Yahweh of Armies.
The calamity of Moab is near to come, and his affliction hurries fast.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: All you who are around him, bemoan him; and all you who know his name, say,‘How the strong staff is broken, the beautiful rod!’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
“You daughter who dwells in Dibon, come down from your glory, 
and sit in thirst; for the destroyer of Moab has come up against you. He has destroyed your strongholds.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Inhabitant of Aroer, st and by the way and watch. Ask him who flees, and her who escapes; 
say, ‘What has been done?’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Moab is disappointed; for it is broken down. Wail and cry! Tell it by the Arnon, that Moab is laid waste.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Judgment has come on the plain country—on Holon, on Jahzah, on Mephaath,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: on Dibon, on Nebo, on Beth Diblathaim,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: on Kiriathaim, on Beth Gamul, on Beth Meon,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
on Kerioth, on Bozrah, 
and on all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The horn of Moab is cut off, and his arm is broken,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Make him drunk, for he magnified himself against Yahweh. Moab will wallow in his vomit, and he also will be in derision.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For wasn’t Israel a derision to you? Was he found among thieves? For as often as you speak of him, you shake your head.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: You inhabitants of Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock. Be like the dove that makes her nest over the mouth of the abyss.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
“We have heard of the pride of Moab. He is very proud in his loftiness, his pride, 
his arrogance, and the arrogance of his heart.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I know his wrath,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,
that it is nothing; his boastings have done nothing.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Therefore I will wail for Moab. Yes, I will cry out for all Moab. 
They will mourn for the men of Kir Heres.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: With more than the weeping of JazerI will weep for you, vine of Sibmah. Your branches passed over the sea. They reached even to the sea of Jazer. The destroyer has fallen on your summer fruits and on your vintage.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Gladness and joy is taken away from the fruitful field and from the land of Moab. I have caused wine to cease from the wine presses. No one will tread with shouting. 
The shouting will be no shouting.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
Yahweh

segments.text: Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,

him who offers in the high place, 
and him who burns incense to his gods.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Therefore my heart sounds for Moab like flutes, and my heart sounds like flutes for the men of Kir Heres. 
Therefore the abundance that he has gotten has perished.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For every head is bald, and every beard clipped. There are cuttings on all the hands, and sackcloth on the waist.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
On all the housetops of Moab, and in its streets, there is lamentation everywhere; 
for I have broken Moab like a vessel in which no one delights,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

How it is broken down! How they wail! How Moab has turned the back with shame! So will Moab become a derision
and a terror to all who are around him.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For Yahweh says:
Behold, he will fly as an eagle, and will spread out his wings against Moab.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Kerioth is taken, and the strongholds are seized. The heart of the mighty men of Moab at that daywill be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Moab will be destroyed from being a people, because he has magnified himself against Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Terror, the pit, and the snare are on you, inhabitant of Moab,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
He who flees from the terror will fall into the pit; and he who gets up out of the pit will be taken in the snare, for I will bring on him, even on Moab, the year of their visitation,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

Those who fled st and without strength under the shadow of Heshbon; for a fire has gone out of Heshbon, 
and a flame from the middle of Sihon, and has devoured the corner of Moab, and the crown of the head of the tumultuous ones.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Woe to you, O Moab! The people of Chemosh are undone; for your sons are taken away captive, and your daughters into captivity.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Yet I will reverse the captivity of Moab in the latter days,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh. Thus far is the judgment of Moab.
